scripts.dev: ALBUMENTATIONS_DISABLE_VERSION_CHECK=1 MPLCONFIGDIR=.mplconfig UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python main.py
scripts.check: ALBUMENTATIONS_DISABLE_VERSION_CHECK=1 MPLCONFIGDIR=.mplconfig UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run ruff check --fix . && ALBUMENTATIONS_DISABLE_VERSION_CHECK=1 MPLCONFIGDIR=.mplconfig UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run ruff format .
scripts.check-types: ALBUMENTATIONS_DISABLE_VERSION_CHECK=1 MPLCONFIGDIR=.mplconfig PYRIGHT_PYTHON_IGNORE_WARNINGS=1 UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run pyright
